text: Pacific Coast Manpower Inc. is hiring 50 domestic workers for Riyadh, Saudi Arabia. USD 5,000 placement fee. We will keep your passport until you finish 2 years.
Filipino domestic helper needed for Riyadh family. Salary SAR 1,500/month. We hold the passport for safekeeping during the 2-year contract.
I am a Nepali domestic helper in Hong Kong. My employer holds my passport since I arrived 18 months ago. I cannot leave the house without permission.
I owe Hong Kong City Credit Management Group HKD 25,000. They keep raising the interest. I cannot leave my employment until I finish paying.
Free placement for Hong Kong domestic helpers, just sign here for the salary advance loan. We will deduct 60% of your monthly wage for 18 months until paid off.
Domestic worker positions in Hong Kong, USD 4,000 placement fee payable to account TEST-9988-7766-5544 directly from your account.
Pekerja rumah tangga untuk Hong Kong, biaya penempatan IDR 35,000,000 harus dibayar di muka. Tidak ada gaji bulan pertama.

WANTED: LENDING BANK BASED IN HONG KONG IS LOOKING FOR THIS OFW FOR BANK FRAUD/ESTAFA CASE FOR ISSUING A PHIL. PASSPORT AS A COLLATERAL AND WENT HIDING AFTER RECEIVING THE LOAN. ASAP PAY UR OVERDUES. Tag this OFW.
Photo and full name of OFW Maria Cruz, passport number P12345678, who borrowed HKD 30,000 from Yoursun Caretaker. Share until paid back.
Domestic worker for Riyadh family. Live-in, no day off, alone in the house. Sponsor visa under kafala system. Salary SAR 1,200.
Filipina housemaid wanted in Dubai. Sponsor will hold all your documents during the 2-year contract for safekeeping. Live-in only.

URGENT: 30 caregivers needed in Hong Kong. Free placement (small processing fee USD 800). Trust me, the agency boss will help you with everything. Send your NBI clearance and passport scan to whatsapp +85295551234.
Lowongan kerja domestik di Singapura. Gratis processing! Kirim foto KTP dan paspor ke WhatsApp pribadi.
Domestic helper for Qatar family. You will not be allowed to leave the compound without sponsor. No personal phone allowed.
Maid wanted for Kuwait family. Salary deposited annually instead of monthly to ensure you complete the 2-year contract.
Looking for young Nepali girls aged 14-16 for domestic work in Dubai. No experience needed. We arrange documents.
Live-in housekeeper for Riyadh, isolated villa, you will be alone with the family. No phone, no contact with outside.
Sign this contract for monthly salary $800. Once you arrive in Saudi Arabia, you will sign the real contract for $400 with longer hours.
If you don't pay back the loan, we will tell your family in the Philippines and post your passport on Facebook. We know where your sister works.
POEA-licensed agency XYZ Manpower hiring nurses for HK. Standard 1-month-salary placement fee per RA 8042. Direct hire, all documents handled at consulate.
Looking for Filipino domestic helper. HKD 5,000 monthly salary (above minimum), one day off per week, contract registered with EAA. Standard MDW terms.
What is the maximum placement fee a recruitment agency can charge under RA 8042?
I have a friend who recommended a Hong Kong family directly. They said no agency needed. Salary is HKD 4,500.
Job offer from Dubai. Salary AED 1,200 (below MDW standard but employer says will increase after probation).
